description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a cartoonish orange cow or bull. The toy features a round, fluffy body with a textured, curly fur-like material on its torso and smooth fabric on its limbs and head. It has two prominent orange horns, large blue embroidered eyes, and a wide, smiling white snout with two black nostrils and a small red tongue. The ears are orange with a lighter inner section, and the toy has four stubby legs with defined hooves. The back of the toy is plain, showing the fluffy body and a small brown tail.
description: A plush orange cow or bull stuffed toy with large blue eyes, orange horns, and a fluffy body. It has a smiling face, four stubby legs, and a small tail.
description_view_0: The back view shows the fluffy, curly-textured body, orange horns, ears, and a small brown tail.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the profile of the face, the large blue eye, the white snout, and the orange limbs.
description_view_2: The front view displays the smiling face with blue eyes, white snout, orange horns, and both front legs visible.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the other profile, with the blue eye, snout, and the tail partially visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with large, wide blue eyes and a broad, smiling mouth showing a small pink tongue. The eyebrows are slightly arched, enhancing the playful and welcoming look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is in a seated posture with its legs extended forward and arms resting at its sides. The head is upright and facing forward.
